description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/ccrpc/plandocument/hugo and defines a variable theme_version set to 0.1.16. Add a pages job (runs in the deploy stage) that is limited to the master branch (only: master), executes the shell commands: mkdir -p themes/plandocument, cd themes/plandocument, wget "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/9642800/packages/generic/plandocument/$theme_version/plandocument-$theme_version.zip", unzip plandocument-$theme_version.zip, cd ../.., hugo, and publishes the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add a test job (runs in the test stage) that runs on all branches except master (except: master), runs the same sequence of commands as the pages job, and does not produce any artifacts. Both jobs share the same theme download and Hugo build steps, and the pipeline relies solely on the specified Docker image without additional services or caches.
